refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused. Refining it into sub-FRs that address key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency and task execution efficiency) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that optimized equipment operation and task execution contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.
DP2: Implement task scheduling and coordination system to optimize task execution efficiency.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both equipment operation and task execution efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling requires interface coordination.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically coupled but can be modularized with well-defined interfaces to minimize coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable telemetry and tasking data.
Risk that poor interface design could increase coupling and reduce modularity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions between vehicle control and task scheduling modules to maintain low coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Realizes DP1: advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle module exchanges operational data and status telemetry with NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task execution instructions from Teleoperation or NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module strongly contains DP1 with minimal diffusion.
Teleoperation module less suitable for DP1; more focused on remote control.
Safety Services module unrelated to productivity DP.
NGHE Solution module could contain DP1 but less focused than Vehicle.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the best architectural boundary to realize advanced vehicle control algorithms for productivity.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution module responsibilities.
Interface complexity with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify module responsibilities and interfaces to avoid overlap and reduce interface complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well matched with selected DPs addressing key productivity drivers with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Risk of diffusion if vehicle control algorithms are partially implemented outside Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment score and minimal diffusion risk for DP1.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification of productivity via telemetry and tasking data is feasible with current module interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DP1 to Vehicle module supports ownership and verification.

recommended_revisions: Define clear interface contracts between Vehicle, Teleoperation, and NGHE Solution modules.
Review task execution efficiency DP2 assignment and IM mapping in next decomposition level.

decision.justification: The current level decomposition is sound for DP1 and Vehicle module assignment, but DP2 (task execution efficiency) requires further decomposition and IM assignment to complete the productivity FR coverage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

revise.why: Further refine FR2 and assign appropriate IM for task execution efficiency to ensure full coverage of productivity requirement.

assumptions: Telemetry and tasking interfaces are reliable and available.
Vehicle module can encapsulate advanced control algorithms.
open_risks: Potential interface complexity and overlap between modules.
Incomplete IM assignment for task execution efficiency DP.
evidence_needed: Telemetry and tasking data interface specifications.
Module responsibility definitions and ownership agreements.
